positive: A stylized, highly detailed botanical composition featuring interconnected bioluminescent flora and whimsical woodland creatures. The style should be a mix of sophisticated line art and muted watercolor wash, resulting in a deep silhouette against a clean, slightly textured background. Focus on central composition with strong, repeating motifs—like stylized mushrooms, ferns, and glowing vines—creating an ethereal, enchanting scene. Utilize negative space effectively to make the subject pop. The color palette should be deep emerald greens, midnight blues, dusty purples, and pops of soft, glowing cyan, all rendered with perfect symmetry and clean edges suitable for screen printing. High contrast, intricate detail, graphic quality, vector illustration look.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, copyright, signature, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, messy, gradient background, photorealism, logo, celebrity, brand name
